name: structural-rubble-solidity
description: Verify support loss, non-pushing falling state, and solid punchable settled rubble.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local PS=game:GetService('PhysicsService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=7,row=1}) task.wait(.34) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local falling,playerCollision=0,0 for _,b in ipairs(root['Depth Blocks']:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') then falling+=1 if PS:CollisionGroupsAreCollidable(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup,b.CollisionGroup) then playerCollision+=1 end end end local fragment=root['Depth Physics Debris']:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('BasePart') local characterGroup=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup local fragmentGroup=fragment and fragment.CollisionGroup or 'none' local fragmentPlayerCollision=fragment and PS:CollisionGroupsAreCollidable(characterGroup,fragment.CollisionGroup) or false return H:JSONEncode({falling=falling,playerCollision=playerCollision,characterGroup=characterGroup,fragmentGroup=fragmentGroup,fragmentPlayerCollision=fragmentPlayerCollision,valid=falling>=2 and playerCollision==0 and characterGroup=='PlayerCharacters' and fragmentGroup=='DepthFragments' and not fragmentPlayerCollision})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local PS=game:GetService('PhysicsService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local detached,solid,punchable,grouped,settledAnchored=0,0,0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(root['Depth Blocks']:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') and not b:GetAttribute('Broken') then detached+=1 if b.CanCollide then solid+=1 end if b.CanQuery and (b:GetAttribute('HP') or 0)>0 then punchable+=1 end if b.CollisionGroup=='DepthRubble' and PS:CollisionGroupsAreCollidable(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CollisionGroup,b.CollisionGroup) then grouped+=1 end if b.Anchored and b:GetAttribute('StructuralSettled') then settledAnchored+=1 end end end local valid=detached>=2 and solid==detached and punchable==detached and grouped==detached and settledAnchored==detached return H:JSONEncode({detached=detached,solid=solid,punchable=punchable,playerSolid=grouped,settledAnchored=settledAnchored,valid=valid})

steps.label: settled rubble remains stable and punchable
